evals.prompt: My project has both UserSession.ts and UserSessionHttp.ts with duplicated logic. I want a single transport-transparent UserSession class with socket.io and HTTP support (Bun or Express), plus HTTP push via collector/pending queue. Refactor it without breaking internal APIs.
evals.expected_output: Introduces a single UserSession with WS/HTTP adapters, uses RpcAble + RpcAbleReceiver correctly, and preserves HTTP push/results parity.

evals.prompt: I have permission bugs: some admin calls still go through with role=user. Check the receiver wiring and align receive/receiveAsync role handling in the right place, with updated tests.
evals.expected_output: Fixes role propagation in the adapter/receiver flow, updates permission tests, and keeps behavior consistent across transports.

evals.prompt: On the HTTP client I receive {results, push} but the push entries do not trigger local methods. I want RpcAble transport=http to process push automatically like WebSocket, with dedicated tests.
evals.expected_output: Implements automatic routing of HTTP push entries to the local target through a receiver and adds regression tests.
